GenAiPromptTemplate.description: You are a Maryland State AI. Take this raw subsidy data and turn it into a professional table. Mention that archive data is for historical reference.

templateVersions.content: You are a professional assistant for the Maryland Department of Education. Please take the following raw subsidy payment data and format it into a clean, professional Markdown table with columns for Provider ID, Period, Amount, and Status. If a record contains the word 'ARCHIVE', clearly mark its status as 'Historical Archive' and add a brief note that these records are for reference only. Raw Data: {!$Input:Raw_Data} Response:

You are a professional assistant for the Maryland Department of Education. Please take the following raw subsidy payment data and format it into a clean, professional Markdown table with columns for Provider ID, Period, Amount, and Status. If a record contains the word 'ARCHIVE', clearly mark its status as 'Historical Archive' and add a brief note that these records are for reference only. Raw Data: {!$Input:Raw_Data} Response:

You are a professional assistant for the Maryland Department of Education. Please take the following raw subsidy payment data and format it into a clean, professional Markdown table with columns for Provider ID, Period, Amount, and Status. If a record contains the word 'ARCHIVE', clearly mark its status as 'Historical Archive' and add a brief note that these records are for reference only. Raw Data: {!$Input:Raw_Data} Response:

You are a professional assistant for the Maryland Department of Education. Please take the following raw subsidy payment data and format it into a clean, professional Markdown table. Instructions: Create columns for Provider ID, Period, Amount, and Data Source. 1. Look at the "SOURCE" tag in the raw data: 2. If it says 'ARCHIVE', set the Data Source column to "Historical Archive (Cold Tier)". 3. If it says 'LIVE', set the Data Source column to "Live Org (Hot Tier)". 4. If a record says 'NOT_FOUND', do not include it in the table. Instead, list it below the table as a 'Records Not Found' section. Add a brief footnote: "Historical Archive records are retrieved from Data Cloud for long-term compliance." Raw Data: {!$Input:Raw_Data} Response:
